title: phalangium reflexum
intro: Phalangium reflexum, also known as the "Hooked Spiderwort," is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows as a perennial herb with medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to promote overall health and well-being.
